nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Yellow wattlebird
nodes.summary: Yellow wattlebird（Yellow wattlebird，学名 Anthochaera paradoxa），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于金岛、莫宁顿半岛、維多利亞州。

nodes.name: 莫宁顿半岛
nodes.summary: 莫宁顿半岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Spiny-cheeked honeyeater、Yellow wattlebird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 金岛
nodes.summary: 金岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Tasmanian boobook、Black-headed honeyeater、Yellow wattlebird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 維多利亞州
nodes.summary: 維多利亞州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联29种鸟类，包括尖羽树鸭、Black-eared cuckoo、巨地鸠等29种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Yellow wattlebirds are common in Tasmania, especially in the eastern and central areas. They are uncommon on King Island, and two possible sightings recorded on the southern Mornington Peninsula in Victoria lack material evidence. Yellow wattlebirds live in a variety of habitats including both dry and wet forests, and from sea level to the subalpine zone. They live in coastal heaths, forests and gardens near Eucalyptus trees. They also can be found in mountain shrubberies and open woodlands, particularly those dominated by Banksia. They have also been known to occur on golf courses, and in orchards, parks and gardens
